mapper.sql: id, user_name, user_pwd, true_name, email, phone, is_valid, role_ids, create_date, update_date
mapper.select: select from t_user where user_name=#{userName} and is_valid=1
mapper.insert:
insert into t_user
user_name, user_pwd, true_name, email, phone, is_valid, role_ids,
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trueName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isValid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{roleIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
insert into t_user (user_name, user_pwd, true_name, email, phone, is_valid, role_ids) values (#{userName}, #{userPwd}, #{trueName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{isValid}, #{roleIds})

insert into t_user (user_name, user_pwd, true_name, email, phone, is_valid, role_ids) values
(#{item.userName}, #{item.userPwd}, #{item.trueName}, #{item.email}, #{item.phone}, #{item.isValid}, #{item.roleIds})
mapper.select: select from t_user where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and is_valid = 1

select from t_user where is_valid = 1
and user_name like concat('%',#{userName},'%')
and email like concat('%',#{email},'%')
and phone like concat('%',#{phone},'%')
order by create_date desc

update.foreach: update t_user set true_name = #{item.trueName} where id = #{item.id}

mapper.delete: update t_user set is_valid = 0 where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_user set is_valid = 0 where id in
#{item}
mapper.select: select from t_user where is_valid = 1 order by id
